purpose: Synthetic caller-supplied response candidates for offline direct-CSV envelope validation.
provenance: No transport occurred; body bytes are opaque and establish no provider or CSV-semantic provenance.

cases.description: Status 200, one CSV media header, explicit identity encoding, exact Content-Length, and the canonical query-bearing M7d target.

expectation.note: The ignored header, full URL, and fragment are absent from M7e-owned facts; the bounded raw body is retained intentionally.
